positive: A stylized, symmetrical design featuring interlocking celestial elements and ornate botanical motifs. The central composition should depict crescent moons, stylized constellations, and large, detailed fern fronds intertwined with delicate star paths. Use a deep midnight blue and burnt gold palette with crisp white linework. Style: Neo-Victorian botanical etching meets clean vector art, optimized for screen printing. High contrast, clean silhouettes, flat graphic style, central focus, symmetrical layout, highly intricate line work, suitable for apparel transfer.
